body_transformation: The compact muscular body now features smooth, scale-covered skin in deep ocean blue with teal accents along the spine, replacing the sand-like texture. The dark brown stripes on the back transform into shimmering aquamarine patterns that pulse with a soft seafoam glow. The pale cream underbelly becomes a pearly white, seamlessly blending with the water-inspired palette. Small gill slits appear along the neck, and the pointed tail tip gains a fin-like extension with subtle webbing at the base.
signature_feature: Back stripes: shimmering aquamarine scales with pulsing seafoam glow.
